observed_blocker: ConnectedShadowProfile default-path compatibility and model_worker hard-coded v2 dependency prevent an exact v3-bound runtime policy from loading; Agent-5 detected this before commit and made no remote mutation.

required_change.agent_0: Keep PROFILE_PATH and the ConnectedShadowProfile default pinned to immutable v2 for historical callers; add CURRENT_PROFILE_PATH for v3.
required_change.agent_5: Import CURRENT_PROFILE_PATH in model_worker and construct the connected runtime profile explicitly from v3; bind policy to exact v3/tool hashes and add only the focused v3 selection assertion.

acceptance_commands: exact connected-worker image dependency validation binds CURRENT_PROFILE_PATH v3
fresh v3-bound private two-role proof succeeds
stop_conditions: Agent 5 mutates tools provenance or stages
historical v1 or v2 bytes change
candidate becomes non-null before pre-cut PASS
force push rebase history rewrite or live action
